name: IntOGen_get_drivers
description: Get cancer driver genes for a specific cancer type from IntOGen. Returns genes identified as drivers by computational methods (dNdScv, OncodriveFML, OncodriveCLUSTL, HotMAPS, smRegions, CBaSE, MutPanning) applied to somatic mutation data from thousands of tumors. Each result includes the gene symbol, number of mutations and mutated samples across cohorts. Use IntOGen_list_cancer_types to see available cancer type codes. Example: cancer_type='BRCA' returns 118 driver genes for breast cancer including TP53, PIK3CA, GATA3.

cancer_type.description: IntOGen cancer type code. Examples: 'BRCA' (breast), 'LUAD' (lung adenocarcinoma), 'COADREAD' (colorectal), 'AML' (acute myeloid leukemia), 'SKCM' (melanoma), 'GBM' (glioblastoma). Use IntOGen_list_cancer_types to see all available codes.

mutations.description: Total number of somatic mutations across cohorts

samples.description: Number of samples with mutations in this gene

cohorts.description: Number of cohorts where gene is detected as driver

driver_genes.description: List of driver genes for the cancer type

total_drivers.description: Total number of driver genes identified

total_cohorts.description: Total number of cohorts analyzed for this cancer type

label: IntOGen
Cancer
Driver Genes

name: IntOGen_get_gene_info
description: Get driver gene classification for a specific gene across all cancer types from IntOGen. Returns the list of cancer types where the gene is identified as a cancer driver, along with the detection methods used (dNdScv, OncodriveFML, OncodriveCLUSTL, HotMAPS, smRegions, CBaSE, MutPanning) and mutation statistics. Example: gene='TP53' is a driver in 74 cancer types; gene='KRAS' is a driver in 22 cancer types.

methods.description: Detection methods that identified this gene as a driver (e.g., dndscv, hotmaps, oncodrivefml, smregions, cbase, mutpanning, oncodriveclustl, combination)

mutated_samples.description: Number of samples with mutations in this gene

total_samples.description: Total number of samples in the cancer type

cancer_types.description: Cancer types where the gene is classified as a driver

num_cancer_types.description: Number of cancer types where gene is a driver

label: IntOGen
Cancer
Gene Analysis

name: IntOGen_list_cohorts
description: List available cancer cohorts from IntOGen with sample counts and tumor types. Returns cohort IDs, names, data sources (TCGA, ICGC, Hartwig, etc.), sample counts, tumor type (Primary/Metastasis), and age group (Adult/Pediatric). Optionally filter by cancer type. IntOGen includes 271 cohorts from major genomic studies. Example: cancer_type='BRCA' returns 14 breast cancer cohorts from TCGA, Hartwig, ICGC, and others.

cancer_type.description: Optional cancer type code to filter cohorts. If omitted, returns all 271 cohorts. Examples: 'BRCA', 'LUAD', 'COADREAD'.

name.description: Full descriptive name of the cohort

cancer_type.description: Cancer type code (only in all-cohorts mode)

cancer_name.description: Full cancer type name (only in all-cohorts mode)

samples.description: Number of samples in the cohort

drivers.description: Number of driver genes found (only in all-cohorts mode)

label: IntOGen
Cancer
Cohorts

name: IntOGen_list_cancer_types
description: List all 87 cancer types available in IntOGen with their codes and full names. Returns cancer type identifiers (e.g., BRCA, LUAD, COADREAD, AML, SKCM) that can be used with IntOGen_get_drivers and IntOGen_list_cohorts. IntOGen covers 87 cancer types spanning solid tumors, hematological malignancies, and pediatric cancers.

cancer_type_id.description: Cancer type code (e.g., BRCA, LUAD, AML)

cancer_name.description: Full descriptive name of the cancer type

cancer_types.description: List of all cancer types in IntOGen

total_cancer_types.description: Total number of cancer types available

label: IntOGen
Cancer
Cancer Types
